name: UBA : Failed to Set Mailbox Audit Logging Bypass
notes: Detects when a user failed to correctly set mailbox audit logging bypass.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250684) Set MailboxAuditBypassAssociation Failed
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Failed to Set Mailbox Audit Logging Bypass on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250684) Set MailboxAuditBypassAssociation Failed
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Failed to Set Mailbox Audit Logging Bypass
